race.description: Next Meeting Geraldton Gold Cup April 19th Hcp
race.comment: LEONARDO DA GREY (2) went to Ascot on a Saturday race when 1.4L off the winner. Back to this track and trip looks ideal and his form here at the end of last campaign stacks right up. Ramoly knows him well and he should be flying late in the race. CATERAN (1) won two on end before getting a mile back last start and closing nicely to be 2.6L off the winner over this course and distance. He can sit closer today from a better barrier and he boasts a good record over this track and trip. Can make his presence felt. MUST BE NICE (6) will find this much easier than what he tackled last timeout and he's a big winner over this course and distance at his only try. Needs some luck, but he looks a progressive type and this looks well within his wheelhouse. CRAMPIN' MY STYLE (7) comes here after being gelded since his last run. Faithfull rides now and he won't be far away. PRINCE EPAULETTE (17) was good first-up at Belmont and can play a leading role back to this level.
